pronunciation_notes: ElevenLabs handles 'categorise' and 'live' (verb) correctly with natural context — no phonetic respellings required with Liam/Alice. Monitored in QA: both words sound correct.
notes: AKB-2 r9 fix: re-rendered with Liam+Alice (both approved voices). Added gap-filler clips s03 (bridge 0:04-0:09 silence) and s06 (bridge 0:14-0:20 silence). Added s11 audience-view narration over 6s freeze frame. Visual extended to 46.62s via freeze-frame append.

steps.display_text: A Categorise slide turns sorting into a live quiz.
steps.tts_text: A Categorise slide turns sorting into a live quiz.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Your editor is loading — in a moment we'll pick the slide type.
steps.tts_text: Your editor is loading — in a moment we'll pick the slide type.

steps.display_text: Select Categorise from the slide type picker, in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Categorise from the slide type picker, in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Type your sorting challenge in the question field.
steps.tts_text: Type your sorting challenge in the question field.

steps.display_text: Now add the items participants will sort.
steps.tts_text: Now add the items participants will sort.

steps.display_text: Enter the items, separated by commas — AhaSlides splits them automatically.
steps.tts_text: Enter the items, separated by commas — AhaSlides splits them automatically.

steps.display_text: Give your first category a name — this is the bucket they'll sort items into.
steps.tts_text: Give your first category a name — this is the bucket they'll sort items into.

steps.display_text: Click Add Category to create as many buckets as you need.
steps.tts_text: Click Add Category to create as many buckets as you need.

steps.display_text: Your slide is ready — hit Present to go live with your audience.
steps.tts_text: Your slide is ready — hit Present to go live with your audience.

steps.display_text: Participants drag items into the right category on their phones — results appear on your screen in real time.
steps.tts_text: Participants drag items into the right category on their phones — results appear on your screen in real time.
